subsidyType: citywide lead service line replacement program with lookup guidance and scheduled replacement coordination
publicSideCovered: yes the city coordinates public-side replacement during scheduled project work
privateSideCovered: yes qualifying replacement work includes private-side coordination within the city program
propertyRules: property must be identified through the city water guidance inventory path or replacement outreach
contractorRules: city-contracted replacement work and homeowner coordination rules apply to the active project area
